options.command: npx sass --load-path=node_modules libs/cds-styles/src:dist/cds-styles --no-source-map && cp libs/cds-styles/tailwind.config.js dist/cds-styles/tailwind.config.js && cp -r libs/cds-styles/src/themes/fonts/assets dist/cds-styles/assets && cp -r libs/cds-styles/src/themes/fonts/assets dist/cds-styles/themes/fonts/assets
